name: Jasper de Shields
tagline: I build products from zero to revenue.
bio:
I'm a product engineer who operates at the intersection of deep product thinking and full-stack execution. I don't just spec features — I ship them. Most product people can't build. Most engineers can't think in users. I do both, and I use AI systems to do it at a pace most teams can't match.

I run 5 parallel projects at any given time, each at a different stage. Right now that means a dopamine detox app in the App Store, a live AI tools business with automated marketing, and an AI call intelligence platform being demoed to investors. I'm also the one building the infrastructure that runs all of it autonomously.

I don't build for the process. I build for the outcome — financial independence through products that compound after I stop touching them. Every system I design, I design myself out of.
currentFocus: Getting North live on the App Store and building the agent infrastructure that runs everything autonomously.
